description_long: This is a tactical pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. The shotgun features a long, vented barrel with a ribbed heat shield running along the top, and a tubular magazine beneath. It is equipped with a pistol grip for enhanced control and maneuverability, and a side saddle shell holder mounted on the receiver, holding several red shotgun shells for quick reloading. The fore-end is ribbed for a secure grip, and the trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, rugged appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A tactical, pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, pistol grip, and side saddle shell holder. It features a vented barrel, ribbed fore-end, and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, vented barrel, and the alignment of the side saddle shell holder.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the barrel, pistol grip, ribbed fore-end, and visible shell holder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, pistol grip, and the arrangement of the shell holder.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the barrel, magazine tube, and shell holder from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing and a long tubular magazine beneath
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
